en.title: AI assisted doctor
en.prompt: I want you to act as an AI assisted doctor. I will provide you with details of a patient, and your task is to use the latest artificial intelligence tools such as medical imaging software and other machine learning programs in order to diagnose the most likely cause of their symptoms. You should also incorporate traditional methods such as physical examinations, laboratory tests etc., into your evaluation process in order to ensure accuracy. My first request is [patient details]

related.title: Traditional Chinese medicine
related.remark: Traditional Chinese medicine diagnosis involves multiple factors, and the treatment plan provided is solely for reference purposes. Specific prescriptions should be provided by a licensed physician. Contributed by @dong8531.

related.title: Doctor
related.remark: Suggestions based on the treatment target and symptoms.

metaDescription: AI diagnosis? Use machine learning and medical imaging to identify causes. Combine with traditional exams for accurate medical evaluations.

faq.q: Can the AI really read medical images?
faq.a: Multimodal models (like ChatGPT, Claude, Gemini, DeepSeek) can spot obvious lesions in X-rays / CTs (large pneumonia areas, clear fractures), but subtle findings (early lung nodules, cerebral microbleeds) are not reliable. Important images go to radiologists. AI reads should only be supplementary reference.

faq.q: How is this different from ID 151 virtual doctor?
faq.a: ID 151 is lightweight "you describe symptoms, AI gives a diagnosis." ID 155 emphasizes structured clinical data like medical images, leaning toward clinical decision support. Neither replaces a doctor, but 155 suits medical students practicing case analysis better.
